# MDE v1.5.13

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed current-document search when a read-only AI summary or translation result is visible. Search queries, match counts, active-match movement, and pinned search highlights now flow into the AI result editor instead of only the normal editable Markdown editor.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added unit and integration coverage for AI result search wiring.
- Extended the AI summary and translation E2E flow to verify searching inside a translated result reports the expected match count.

## Documentation

- Updated the Chinese search manual to note that current-document search also works on visible read-only AI summary and translation results.

## Verification

- `pnpm run lint`
- `pnpm run typecheck`
- `pnpm run docs:build`
- `pnpm run build`
- `pnpm run test:unit`
- `pnpm run test:integration`
- `pnpm run test:e2e`
- `pnpm --filter @mde/desktop test:e2e`
- Focused verification for `AiResultPanel`, app shell AI search wiring, the new AI result search integration test, and the AI translation E2E scenario.

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow.
- Windows NSIS artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow when the Windows release job is enabled.
